title: Attach images as materials
summary: Upload images into the active presentation, describe them, then attach one when it belongs on a slide.

signals.title: Describe
signals.body: Metadata records alt text and caption.

signals.title: Attach
signals.body: JSON stores an optional media object.

signals.title: Render
signals.body: The DOM places image and caption together.

guardrails.title: Small files
guardrails.body: Server limits keep the repo manageable.

guardrails.title: Explicit attach
guardrails.body: Upload alone never edits a slide.
